global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'PixelForge' logo positioned in the top left. The main message is conveyed through a prominent headline 'Win epic rewards' and supporting body text 'No ads in first week', both centered in the middle of the ad. A call-to-action button labeled 'Claim reward' is located at the bottom center. A 'BONUS' badge is placed in the top right corner, enhancing the promotional aspect. Decorative segmented crops are used throughout the ad to add visual interest.
global.main_message: Encouragement to claim rewards with a promotional offer
